output:
Executed T8. I audited the `useAutoSaveSettings` direct-caller surface and only changed callers that still depended on unstable whole-object references or an obsolete save callback workaround. `usePersistentPromptSettings`, `useImageGenGallery`, `useAudio`, `useOutputSelection`, `useStructureVideo`, and `useJoinSegmentsSettings` now consume stable selector/callback pieces from the adapter; `useGenerationEditSettings` now keeps its merge setters stable via refs so the transitive `useEditSettingsPersistence` and `useInlineEditState` paths stay compatible without reintroducing callback churn. Travel-between-images seeding behavior remains preserved: `useShotSettings` still uses `saveImmediate(payload)` for unopened-shot LoRA seeding, and generation edit deferred text editing plus `initializeFrom` behavior remain intact.

Verification completed with full-module tests and typecheck: targeted caller/transitive suites passed, `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts` passed, `src/tools/join-clips/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClipsSettings.test.ts` passed, and `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean. I also checkpointed the batch result to `.megaplan/plans/milestone-m1a-from-docs-state-20260416-0928/execution_batch_5.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Audited the full direct-caller inventory from T3 and only changed callers that were still holding unstable `useAutoSaveSettings` object references or obsolete callback workarounds. Direct consumers `usePersistentPromptSettings`, `useImageGenGallery`, `useAudio`, `useOutputSelection`, `useStructureVideo`, and `useJoinSegmentsSettings` now depend on stable selectors/callbacks instead of the whole adapter object, and `useGenerationEditSettings` now keeps merge setters stable via refs so transitive consumers (`useEditSettingsPersistence`, `useInlineEditState`) retain deferred text-editing and `initializeFrom` semantics without callback churn. Travel-between-images seeding behavior remains preserved: `useShotSettings` still uses `saveImmediate(payload)` for unopened-shot LoRA seeding and `useJoinSegmentsSettings` still seeds inherited shot settings immediately, now through the stabilized `saveImmediate` directly. Verified compatibility with full-module tests for prompt settings, persistent tool state, join-clips compatibility, travel settings/provider/output/segment flows, inline edit, generation-edit persistence, image-lightbox environment, module import coverage, and `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. I audited the direct caller list from T3 and confirmed compatibility across all callers; only the consumers still depending on the whole `useAutoSaveSettings` object or a stale-callback workaround needed edits. Travel-between-images seeding via `saveImmediate(payload)` remains intact in `useShotSettings`, generation edit deferred text-editing plus `initializeFrom` behavior remain intact through `useGenerationEditSettings`/`useEditSettingsPersistence`, and the transitive inline-edit/lightbox paths passed their full module tests after the caller-stability cleanup.
